text:
Market today: Cautious optimism in tech/chips, driven by renewed AI enthusiasm and strong demand signals from companies like ASML. This is a tailwind for your concentrated book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-30.59%) and SPAL (-36.78%) need immediate attention. Both are leveraged, decay-prone ETFs showing significant losses. Margin amplifies these drops. SMH (-5.67%) is also down, but less critically.

Watch: Keep an eye on the continued strength of the AI narrative and any shifts in semiconductor demand. Closely monitor your leveraged positions for further decay or stop breaches.

Bottom line: Manage risk on your volatile leveraged positions while selectively riding the AI momentum.
plays: Trim SOXL. Your -30.59% loss and the leveraged nature mean decay hurts. Consider reducing exposure to this volatile position.
Review SPAL's -36.78% loss on a new, leveraged position. Respect the 21.38 stop to limit further drawdown.
Consider a new buy on AMD, riding the AI chip demand. Scanner entry 547.58-547.03, stop 545.95.
